name: R8左轮手枪 | 疯狂老八
nameZh: R8左轮手枪 | 疯狂老八
descriptionEn: The R8 Revolver delivers a highly accurate and powerful round at the expense of a lengthy trigger-pull. Firing rapidly by fanning the hammer may be the best option when point-blank stopping power is required. It has been custom painted with a purple barrel and a number 8 on the grip. Inspired by the events of December 8th, 2015
descriptionZh: R8左轮手枪有着高度精准且极具杀伤力的子弹，但代价是扳机拉动时间较长。在需要近距离火力压制的情况下，用手扳动击锤快速射击或许是最佳选择。 这把武器采用了自定义涂装，紫色枪管搭配握把上的数字8，相得益彰。 灵感来源自2015年12月8日事件
